title: season — published events
description: Every event implements `ShouldDispatchAfterCommit` so listeners never fire against a rolled-back write. Lifecycle events fan out to notifications + activity + audit; financial-relevant events (late_registration_fee_cents changes) additionally feed the audit stream with 7-year retention. SeasonCurrentChanged is the highest-severity event of the module — YoY reporting queries pivot on the current season; every flip generates a mandatory audit row + a cannot-opt-out notification.

events.name: SeasonCreated
events.trigger: SeasonProvisioner finished a successful create. Fires exactly once per `seasons.id`.
consumers: notifications::MaybeDispatchSeasonRegistrationOpeningNotification (scheduled when registration_opens_at is set + within the reminder window)

payload.name: string
payload.season_type: string (annual / academic_year / summer_camp / winter_camp / half_year / quarter / trimester / custom)

events.name: SeasonUpdated
events.trigger: Any Season scalar field mutated except the specific-transition fields below (status, is_current, start_date, end_date, sport_key, late_registration_fee_cents, capacity_target). Umbrella event for renames, description edits, primary_color changes, sort_order tweaks, allows_late_registration toggles.

events.name: SeasonStatusChanged
events.trigger: Season.status transitioned to any new value. A superset event; the specific-state events below (SeasonStarted, SeasonCompleted, ...) fire alongside for the routing case that cares.

events.name: SeasonRegistrationOpened
events.trigger: Season.status transitioned planned -> registration_open. Fires from automated RollSeasonPhaseJob (when now() reaches registration_opens_at) OR manual admin open action. Fires alongside SeasonStatusChanged.
consumers: notifications::DispatchSeasonRegistrationOpeningNotification (only from manual open — automated open already dispatched T-24h and T-1h reminders)

events.name: SeasonRegistrationClosed
events.trigger: Season.status transitioned registration_open -> registration_closed. Fires from CloseExpiredRegistrationsJob (every 15 min when now() reaches registration_closes_at) OR manual admin close action. Does NOT block late enrollments — the late window is independent.

events.name: SeasonStarted
events.trigger: Season.status transitioned to in_progress. Fires from automated RollSeasonPhaseJob (when now() reaches start_date OR competition_starts_at when set) OR manual admin start action. Kicks off session scheduling for Wave 3 downstream consumers.
consumers: notifications::DispatchSeasonStartingSoonNotification (to enrolled athletes + coaches at T-48h; ALSO fired here at T-0 as a start confirmation)

events.name: SeasonPlayoffsBegun
events.trigger: Season.status transitioned in_progress -> playoffs. Fires from automated RollSeasonPhaseJob (when now() reaches playoff_starts_at) OR manual admin action. Only fires when Season.has_playoffs=true (guarded by observer).

events.name: SeasonCompleted
events.trigger: Season.status transitioned in_progress -> completed OR playoffs -> completed. Terminal-adjacent state; only archive follows. Fires from automated RollSeasonPhaseJob (when now() reaches end_date OR playoff_ends_at) OR manual admin action.

events.name: SeasonArchived
events.trigger: Season.status transitioned completed -> archived. Soft-delete completed; the row is hidden from tenant selectors + booking flows but readable via `?include_archived=true`. Refused when active downstream enrollments still reference this Season.

events.name: SeasonRestored
events.trigger: Archived -> completed. Only within the retention window (default 2555 days = 7 years). Reactivates the row without touching the (retired) enrollments that pointed at it.

events.name: SeasonDeleted
events.trigger: Hard-delete completed via PurgeArchivedSeasonsJob (past retention window + no inbound rows) OR via platform-support CLI (two-person path). Wave 3a refuses public hard-delete.
consumers: audit::WriteToAuditLog (retention: 7 years — the audit outlives the row)

payload.season_id: ULID (the row is gone; the ULID is preserved in the audit trail)

events.name: SeasonCurrentChanged
events.trigger: The `is_current=true` flag flipped within a scope tuple. Fires with both the newly-current row + the previously-current row so downstream caches can drop keys keyed on either. AUDIT-CRITICAL: year-over-year reports pivot on `is_current`; changing it shifts the whole reporting frame.

events.name: SeasonDatesShifted
events.trigger: Season.start_date OR Season.end_date OR Season.playoff_starts_at OR Season.playoff_ends_at changed on an in-flight Season (status IN in_progress, playoffs). AUDIT-WARN: affects enrolled athletes' bookings + coach schedules; regulator interest for minors' programs. Refused when status IN in_progress/playoffs/completed UNLESS caller carries `season.dates.shift` permission.

events.name: SeasonSportKeyChanged
events.trigger: Season.sport_key mutated. CRITICAL severity: should never happen post-in_progress; if it does, downstream Team + Enrollment rows carrying this Season may drift into inconsistency (a hockey team enrolled to a suddenly-basketball season). Refused post-in_progress by the observer.

events.name: SeasonCapacityTargetChanged
events.trigger: Season.capacity_target mutated (set / changed / cleared). Feeds capacity-planning dashboards. Not enforced anywhere — informational only.

events.name: SeasonRegistrationCapReached
events.trigger: The enrolled-athlete count for this Season crossed `capacity_target` for the first time. Wave 3 athlete-enrollment consumers fire this from their post-commit hook; this module owns the event class so the notification + audit consumers can subscribe today. Informational only — enrollments continue past capacity_target unless a Wave 3 quota gate blocks them.

payload.triggering_enrollment_id: ULID | null (Wave 3 — will be aen_* once athlete-enrollment ships)

events.name: SeasonLateRegistrationOpened
events.trigger: Season transitioned from registration_closed into the late-registration window (now() >= registration_closes_at AND now() < late_registration_ends_at AND allows_late_registration=true). Fires from CloseExpiredRegistrationsJob when it observes the crossover — the Season row itself stays status=registration_closed; this event is informational to notification consumers.

events.name: TenantDefaultSeasonSeeded
events.trigger: SeedDefaultSeasonForTenantJob completed for an eligible seasonal-business_type tenant. Fires exactly once per tenant lifetime under normal operations (subsequent seasons come from admin action, not from this listener).
